title: DRW MD-DRW-507: Motor Mount Detail
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-507 Rev B — Motor Mount Detail

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1012, P-1013, P-1014, P-1015.
4. Drawn by Marcus Thaine, checked by Tobias Wren, approved by Felix Herrera.
